---
title: "Projects"
---

## 📊 Marketing Analysis Project

- Conducted data analysis using Python
- Cleaned and visualized marketing data
- Generated insights for decision making

---

## 📈 Data Analytics Project

- Analyzed user behavior data
- Built visualizations using Python
- Applied statistical methods to identify trends

---

## 🚀 More Coming Soon

I will continue to add more projects as I develop my skills in data analytics and business strategy.
